flashcards.back: Real-Time Operating System designed for predictable, guaranteed response times in critical applications.
Hard: Missing deadlines = failure (e.g., pacemakers). Soft: Degradation acceptable (e.g., video buffering).
Dedicated combinations of hardware/software for specific tasks (e.g., smart home devices).
Optimized for reliability, minimal resource use, and domain-specific performance.
RTOS (aviation control), Embedded Systems (IoT devices), Hard Real-Time (medical equipment).
